creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

devel/p5-Data-Dump-Streamer is wrong, leads to stray line 
devel/p5-ExtUtils-MakeMaker could be simplified further (ie eliminating plist lines) 
devel/p5-Spoon please keep alphabetic order of man pages 
devel/p5-Test-Harness could be simplified further (ie eliminating plist replacement) 
devel/p5-forks incorrect (includes only post.mk) 
graphics/netpbm sparc64 ifdef shouldn't been removed 
japanese/p5-Jcode incorrectly removed both cases of if statement 
mail/p5-Mail-SpamAssassin incorrect change of .include statement 
print/muttprint could be simplified further (ie eliminating plist replacement) 
security/p5-Authen-SASL broke OPTIONS handling 
security/swatch also need to remove ${BUILD_DEPENDS_56} from the first BUILD_DEPENDS sectino 
www/p5-URI-Fetch broke OPTIONS handling
